zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Pigot於1401年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Geoffrey Pigot28歲，母親Johanna de Ledes29歲。他於1423年與Lady Alicia Fennel在津巴布韋米德藍茲盧曼素利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1460年12月30日在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Pigot was born in 1401, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Pigot, was 28 and his mother, Johanna de Ledes, was 29. He married Lady Alicia Fennel in 1423, in Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbabwe. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 30 December 1460, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Pigot est né en 1401, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Pigot, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Johanna de Ledes, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alicia Fennel en 1423, à Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbabwe. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 30 décembre 1460, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Pigotが1401年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Pigotは28歳，母Johanna de Ledesは29歳であった。1423年にジンバブエミドランズチルマンズリプオンでLady Alicia Fennelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1460年12月30日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Pigot(이)가 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Pigot(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna de Ledes(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1423년 짐바브웨 미들랜드즈 치럼아주 리폰에서 Lady Alicia Fennel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1460년 12월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Pigot nasceu em 1401, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Pigot, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Johanna de Ledes, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alicia Fennel em 1423, em Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbábue. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1460, em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Pigot родился в 1401 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Pigot было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna de Ledes, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alicia Fennel в 1423 г. в местности рипон, чируманзу, мидландс, Зимбабве. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 30 декабря 1460 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1460, en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
